data.title: BlackRock’s crypto ETFs thrive in one of the toughest quarters with $3 billion inflow
data.description:
BlackRock, the largest asset manager in the world, reported $3 billion in digital asset inflows during the first quarter of 2025 despite the volatility in the crypto market. The update came in the firm’s latest earnings report, which also revealed $84 billion in total net flows across its broader portfolio during the quarter.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/blackrocks-crypto-etfs-thrive-in-one-of-the-toughest-quarters-with-3-billion-inflow/

data.title: ProShares UltraShort Ether ETF Leads 2025 ETF Performance with Significant Gains
data.description: According to Foresight News, the decline in Ethereum's price has resulted in a surge for Ethereum inverse ETFs in the market. The ProShares UltraShort Ether ETF (ETHD) has achieved a remarkable year-to-date increase of 247%, making it the top-performing ETF of 2025. ETHD, an Ethereum-linked ETF provided by ProShares, aims for -2 times the daily return of ETH and was listed on the New York Stock Exchange in June this year.

data.title: Illinois Strikes Back at Crypto Scams with Bold New Law
data.description:
Illinois has passed a landmark bill requiring digital asset firms to register and disclose fees, aiming to combat crypto scams and protect investors.

The post Illinois Strikes Back at Crypto Scams with Bold New Law first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/04/11/illinois-strikes-back-at-crypto-scams/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=illinois-strikes-back-at-crypto-scams

data.title: Euro Surges Against the Dollar Amid Tariff Turbulence
data.description:
The euro has surged to a three-year high against the dollar, gaining over 5% since early April as investors sell US assets.
source: https://tokenist.com/euro-surges-against-the-dollar-amid-tariff-turbulence/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=euro-surges-against-the-dollar-amid-tariff-turbulence

data.title: BlackRock increases holdings of 4,238 ETH through its Ethereum ETF
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Arkham monitoring data, about ten minutes ago, BlackRock increased its holdings of 4,238 ETH through its Ethereum exchange-traded fund ETHA Ethereum ETF, worth $6.6 million. Historical data shows that this suspected BlackRock-related Ethereum ETF increased its holdings of ETH for the first time in a month.
